entries.round: task:Execute the critical items from Phase 2 and Phase 3 in tasks.md: 1. Build Home page (app/page.tsx) with a grid layout. 2. Build Article detail page (app/[category]/[slug]/page.tsx) with 'NewsArticle' JSON-LD and SEO metadata. 3. Build Price page (app/bang-gia/page.tsx) fetching from CoinGecko public API with Edge caching. 4. Implement dynamic sitemap (app/sitemap.ts). 5. Add next/script for ad placeholders. Use <write_file> to create these files. Update tasks.md to check off completed items.
